Support

Get help with installation, Pro activation, troubleshooting, and account-free setup. If you need support, email us and we typically respond in 1–3 business days.

Contact

Email: support@adshieldpro.org
Website: https://adshieldpro.org
Response time: Typically 1–3 business days

Activate Pro

1) Purchase on Gumroad
Use the upgrade link on the Pricing page. Gumroad will provide your license key.
2) Enter your license key in the extension
Open AdShield Pro → Upgrade/License → paste the key → verify.
3) Works offline after activation
License verification is user-initiated. The result is stored locally on your device.

Troubleshooting

Extension not showing in the toolbar?
Chrome menu → Extensions → Pin AdShield Pro.
Ads still visible on a site?
Reload the page, check if the site is allowlisted, and confirm AdShield Pro is enabled for that tab.
A site breaks after blocking?
Temporarily disable on that site or add it to your allowlist, then refresh.
Pro key not activating?
Double-check for extra spaces, confirm you're using the latest extension version, and try verifying again. If it still fails, email support with your Gumroad receipt/order details.

FAQ

How do I uninstall?
Chrome → Extensions → Manage Extensions → Remove.
Does AdShield Pro collect any data?
No personal data, no tracking, and no analytics. Settings are stored locally on your device. See Privacy Policy.
How do I upgrade later?
You can upgrade any time from the Pricing page. Pro is a one-time purchase (no subscription). from the Pricing page.
